name: CRESCENT BIOPHARMA, INC.
business: Crescent Biopharma is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing oncology therapeutics. It is developing CR-001, a PD-1 x VEGF bispecific antibody, and ADC programs CR-002 and CR-003. The company has no approved products and has not generated any revenue from product sales.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on delivering the next wave of transformative therapies to bring a brighter future for people living with cancer.
Any drug delivery device that we potentially use to deliver our product candidates may have its own regulatory, development, supply and other risks.

catalysts.event: Global Phase 1/2 trial initiation for CR-001 (ASCEND)
catalysts.sentence: We initiated a global Phase 1/2 trial of CR-001 (the ASCEND trial) in February 2026 and we anticipate initiation of CR-002 and CR-003 monotherapy clinical trials in 2026 as well as the first ADC combination trial with CR-001.

catalysts.event: CR-001 clinical data readout (safety, PK, early activity)
catalysts.sentence: In the first quarter of 2027, we anticipate sharing meaningful data on CR-001’s clinical profile, including initial safety, pharmacokinetics (PK) and early anti-tumor activity from dose escalation and backfill cohorts in first-line and previously treated patients.

catalysts.event: CR-003 Phase 1/2 trial initiation in China
catalysts.sentence: A Phase 1/2 trial of CR-003 is anticipated to be initiated in the first quarter of 2026 in China.
We intend to initiate a Phase 1/2 trial of CR-002 in the second half of 2026.
